modelVersion.description: Version date for the static preview content model.

id.description: Stable content id for the metric tile.

asOf.description: Bilingual, human-readable as-of date shown on the tile, e.g. "As reported January 2023". Required on every tile so no figure reads as a current live total.

dimension.description: Distinguishes teachers who traveled on exchange from the wider population of benefiting teachers (e.g. Panama seminar attendees) the multiplier framing describes, versus general program metrics.

claimStatus.description: Claim status from the RITE research package's claim_status_legend. needs_confirmation material must not be published.

sourceNote.description: Optional human-readable note on where this figure came from.

lastVerified.description: ISO date this figure was last verified against source material.

productionMapping.note: Static preview content only. In the future .NET API / SQLite model, each metric maps to a reviewed ImpactRecord entity (year, metric, value, unit, source, as_of, verification_status per the research package's suggested_entities.impact_record). claimStatus, sourceNote, and lastVerified map to fields on that entity's verification record.
